title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
friendlyTitle: BrowserOS is an open browser built for AI agents
summary: BrowserOS is an open-source agentic browser project positioned as an alternative to browser-integrated AI products. The project supports local and hosted model connections and had about 12.2k stars at review time, placing it among the day’s strongest AI-related trending repositories.
friendlySummary: BrowserOS is a popular open-source browser project that lets people try AI agents in a browser and connect different AI models.
whyItMatters: Use it to experiment with browser-based agent workflows while retaining more control over the browser and model provider. Treat any agent with browsing access as a security-sensitive tool: start with narrow permissions and review actions before allowing consequential changes.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help developers test browser AI tools with more control, but they should begin with safe limits and check important actions.
